title: Other Heavy and Civil Engineering Construction

labor_share.method: QCEW 2024 private total annual wages at 237990 ($13,351,101,919) x benefits multiplier 1.4294 [ECEC private-industry total comp $46.60/hr / wages $32.60/hr = 1.4294 (March 2026 reference period)] / SUSB 2022 receipts at 237990 ($37,005,250,000).
